sentences.target: Mon orgueil me joue des tours.

translations.fr: Mon orgueil me joue des tours.
translations.es: Mi orgullo me juega malas pasadas.
translations.it: Il mio orgoglio mi gioca brutti scherzi.
translations.ru: Моя гордыня играет со мной злые шутки.
translations.vi: Sự kiêu ngạo của tôi hay gây rắc rối cho tôi.
translations.uk: Моя гординя грає зі мною злі жарти.
translations.hi: मेरा अहंकार मुझे परेशान करता है.
translations.el: Η περηφάνια μου μου παίζει παιχνίδια.
translations.nb: Stoltheten min spiller meg et puss.
translations.sv: Min stolthet spelar mig ett spratt.
translations.cs: Moje hrdost si se mnou zahrává.
translations.da: Min stolthed spiller mig et puds.
translations.ja: プライドが自分の足を引っ張っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular) modifying 'orgueil'; marks the possessor of the subject noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person singular), indirect object (dative) of 'joue' in the idiom 'jouer des tours à quelqu'un'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); predicates the action performed by the subject.
Plural indefinite article; determiner introducing 'tours' as the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'joue' within the idiom.

sentences.target: Ton orgueil me fatigue un peu.

translations.fr: Ton orgueil me fatigue un peu.
translations.en: Your pride tires me a bit.
translations.es: Tu orgullo me cansa un poco.
translations.de: Dein Stolz macht mich ein bisschen müde.
translations.it: Il tuo orgoglio mi stanca un po'.
translations.ko: 너의 자존심이 나를 조금 피곤하게 해요.
translations.pt: Seu orgulho me cansa um pouco.
translations.vi: Sự kiêu ngạo của bạn làm tôi hơi mệt.
translations.nl: Jouw trots maakt me een beetje moe.
translations.hu: A te büszkeséged egy kicsit fáraszt.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा अहंकार मुझे थोड़ा थका देता है.
translations.el: Η περηφάνια σου με κουράζει λίγο.
translations.nb: Stoltheten din gjør meg litt sliten.
translations.sv: Din stolthet gör mig lite trött.
translations.da: Din stolthed gør mig lidt træt.
translations.ja: 君のプライドは私を少し疲れさせる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular) modifying 'orgueil'; marks the possessor of the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person singular), direct object (accusative) of 'fatigue'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); expresses causing tiredness.
Indefinite article (singular) determining 'peu'; part of the quantifying expression 'un peu'.
Noun meaning 'small amount'; in 'un peu' functions adverbially as an extent modifier of the verb.

translations.en: Our pride is blocking the discussion.
translations.it: Il nostro orgoglio blocca la discussione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的自负阻碍了讨论。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅自負阻住咗討論。
translations.pt: Nosso orgulho está atrapalhando a conversa.
translations.vi: Sự kiêu ngạo của chúng ta đang cản trở cuộc thảo luận.
translations.hi: हमारा अहंकार बातचीत में बाधा डाल रहा है.
translations.el: Η περηφάνια μας μπλοκάρει τη συζήτηση.
translations.ja: 私たちのプライドが話し合いを妨げている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural) modifying 'orgueil'; marks the possessor of the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); expresses the action performed by the subject.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'discussion' as the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'bloque'.

sentences.target: Son orgueil gâche souvent ses relations.

translations.fr: Son orgueil gâche souvent ses relations.
translations.en: His pride often ruins his relationships.
translations.es: Su orgullo suele arruinar sus relaciones.
translations.de: Sein Stolz ruiniert oft seine Beziehungen.
translations.it: Il suo orgoglio rovina spesso le sue relazioni.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的自负常常毁了他的人际关系。
translations.yue: 佢嘅自負成日破壞佢嘅人際關係。
translations.ru: Его гордыня часто разрушает его отношения.
translations.pt: O orgulho dele costuma arruinar seus relacionamentos.
translations.he: הגאווה שלו לעיתים קרובות הורסת את מערכות היחסים שלו.
translations.tr: Onun gururu ilişkilerini sık sık mahvediyor.
translations.vi: Sự kiêu ngạo của anh ấy thường phá hỏng các mối quan hệ của anh ấy.
translations.nl: Zijn trots verpest vaak zijn relaties.
translations.uk: Його гординя часто руйнує його стосунки.
translations.hu: Az ő büszkesége gyakran tönkreteszi a kapcsolatait.
translations.hi: उसका अहंकार अक्सर उसके रिश्ते बिगाड़ देता है.
translations.pl: Jego duma często psuje jego relacje.
translations.el: Η περηφάνια του συχνά χαλάει τις σχέσεις του.
translations.nb: Stoltheten hans ødelegger ofte forholdene hans.
translations.sv: Hans stolthet förstör ofta hans relationer.
translations.ro: Mândria lui îi strică adesea relațiile.
translations.cs: Jeho hrdost často ničí jeho vztahy.
translations.da: Hans stolthed ødelægger ofte hans relationer.
translations.fi: Hänen ylpeytensä pilaa usein hänen ihmissuhteensa.
translations.ja: 彼のプライドはしばしば人間関係を台無しにする。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) modifying 'orgueil'; gender of possessor is not specified; agrees with the noun.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); expresses the action performed by the subject.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb 'gâche'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) in plural form; modifies 'relations' and marks the possessor of the object NP.
Common noun; direct object of 'gâche'.

Our pride is blocking the discussion.
His pride often ruins his relationships.
